text.title: AI Code Review Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "AI-authored PR opens" to "review-decision artefact committed + merge unblocked or blocked".

step.name: detect-ai
step.input: PR metadata, commit signature, author disclosure.
step.action: Confirm AI involvement: Copilot/Claude/Cursor commit-trailer OR explicit PR-template disclosure. Compute ai_pct_lines = AI-authored lines / new lines.
step.decision-gate: If ai_pct_lines < 30 AND diff is < 50 lines — use generic code-review-process, STOP.

step.name: run-checks
step.action: Walk all 12 checks in order. For each: run detector (lint, type, lockfile diff, regex, manual eyes). Assign verdict per check.
step.decision-gate: If any check is unevaluated — STOP, complete the check.

step.name: aggregate
step.action: Any check=block → verdict=block + block_reason citing the check. Else any check=request-changes → verdict=request-changes. Else verdict=approve.
step.decision-gate: aggregation rule is mechanical, no judgement.

step.name: record
step.action: Compose review-decision JSON. Post to PR as a comment + commit `aicr-<pr-num>.json` to docs/.

step.name: enforce
step.action: Bot reads the JSON. If verdict=block, refuses merge until resolved. If verdict=request-changes, author addresses + re-runs checklist. If verdict=approve, merge enabled.
step.decision-gate: Bot down → fall back to human enforcement; do not bypass.
